label: PASS
rationale: PowerCycle matches LockOnReset [0], so reset sets enabled ReadLocked/WriteLocked cells true; Level0 Locking Locked bit must be 1.

label: FAIL
rationale: PowerCycle matches LockOnReset [0], causing locked cells to become true; returning Locked=0 contradicts the required Locking Feature state.

label: PASS
rationale: An empty LockOnReset set leaves ReadLocked and WriteLocked unchanged on reset; they were false, so the descriptor Locked bit remains 0.

label: FAIL
rationale: With empty LockOnReset, reset must not lock an unlocked enabled range; returning Locked=1 is not supported by the trajectory.

label: PASS
rationale: Hardware reset type 1 does not match LockOnReset [0,3], so the previously false locked cells remain false and Locked=0 is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: Hardware reset does not match the [0,3] LockOnReset values; the range was unlocked, so returning descriptor Locked=1 is wrong.

label: PASS
rationale: Programmatic reset is enabled and LockOnReset contains 3, so TPER_RESET sets ReadLocked/WriteLocked true; descriptor Locked=1 follows.

label: FAIL
rationale: TPER_RESET with ProgrammaticResetEnable true and LockOnReset including 3 must lock the range; returning Locked=0 contradicts the spec.
